item.title: 🚀 @claudeai x @SpaceX 🚀
item.author: @angjiang

item.title: There are only two honest metrics when it comes to benchmarking intelligence: novelty and efficiency...
item.description:
There are only two honest metrics when it comes to benchmarking intelligence: novelty and efficiency.
You don't need intelligence to solve a known problem (only memory). And you don't need intelligence to solve a problem via brute force. But to solve a novel problem efficiently, intelligence is the only way.
--- @fchollet | ❤️ 33 | 🔁 2 | 💬 9 | 👁 1757
item.author: @fchollet

item.title: @Adobe Learn more: https://t.co/HHbVaTFPkB
item.author: @nvidia

item.title:
.@Adobe is building Adobe CX Enterprise Coworker on NemoClaw.
Anil Chakravarthy, President of CX Or...
item.description:
.@Adobe is building Adobe CX Enterprise Coworker on NemoClaw.
Anil Chakravarthy, President of CX Orchestration Business at Adobe, explains how brands can deploy Adobe’s customer experience intelligence within NVIDIA's OpenShell runtime — keeping enterprise agents governed, observable and auditable at scale.
--- @nvidia | ❤️ 23 | 🔁 1 | 💬 5 | 👁 3482
item.author: @nvidia

item.title:
You could watch the World Football Final from home.
Or you could win 2 tickets to watch it in New J...
item.description:
You could watch the World Football Final from home.
Or you could win 2 tickets to watch it in New Jersey with: → Premium seating → Luxury transportation → Expedited stadium access → VIP access to the bronze medal match
First to complete their 14-day streak wins it all.
--- @coinbase | ❤️ 38 | 🔁 5 | 💬 15 | 👁 9312
item.author: @coinbase

item.title:
I'll be at Code with Claude all day today so come find me and let's chat about Claude!

item.description:
I'll be at Code with Claude all day today so come find me and let's chat about Claude!
I'll also be giving a talk on the main stage at 530pm PT so tune in, it will be on the livestream!

item.title:
We're winding back our peak hours limit reduction and doubling 5 hour limits.
Excited to partner wi...
item.description:
We're winding back our peak hours limit reduction and doubling 5 hour limits.
Excited to partner with SpaceX to bring you more compute and we'll keep pushing to bring you the best coding agent in the world.

we design Cursor to be legible, customizable, and deeply under your control.
see less when you need clarity. see more when you want depth.
